steps: Open Source Technologies Compliance: Developments must be done using only open source licenses and software like Xubuntu GNU Linux, GNOME Text Editor (GEdit), GNU Images Manipulation Program (GIMP), Libre Office, Firefox Browser, and GitBook.

Rule of Law (RoL) Interoperability: This license allows the downstream interoperable merging of multiple licenses, or not, through the European Union Public License (EUPL) to facilitate its compatibility and reuse in open source and open educational resource (OER) development.

Open Education: The work must be in compliance with United Nations (UN) Education Science Culture Organization (UNESCO) 'Open Science' and 'Recommendation on Open Educational Resources' and incetives the promotion of open access publishing inclusivity and accessibility.
Do No Harm: Uses of the work must comply with the Ethical Source Hippocratic License 3.0, which requires no use to cause any harm to individuals or communities.

Justice Equity Diversity Inclusion (JEDI) Code of Conduct: All contributors must agree to abide by the Contributor Covenant Code of Conduct to maintain an inclusive, respectful, and harassment-free community.
Attribution (BY): Appropriate credit must be diligently given with the provision of a link to the license and indications of changes made.
NonCommercial (NC): All resources must not be used for commercial purposes, which must be negotiated with the author.
ShareAlike (SA): Remixes, transformations, and buildings made using any of the resources must be distributed alike under the same license as the original.
Creative Commons (CC) Communication to the Original Producer: Since the resources are authorized only for nonviolent nonprofit usages they must be communicated to the licensee to be acceptable.
Fair Use for Rule of Law (RoL) Nonviolent Nonprofit Open Education: This license allows only its fair-labor fair-trade usages. Any other use require official legal contract, so please contact us.
Optional Open Science Compliance: Rule of Law Open Science (RoLOS) by Felipe Ribeiro
creator: Felipe Ribeiro
